tasks.label: Create MAUI Content Page
tasks.command: dotnet new maui-page-xaml -n ${input:pageName} -o ${input:folderName} && sed -i '' 's/^namespace.*/namespace AirIQ.${input:folderName};/' ${input:folderName}/${input:pageName}.xaml.cs && sed -i '' 's/x:Class=".*"/x:Class="AirIQ.${input:folderName}.${input:pageName}"/' ${input:folderName}/${input:pageName}.xaml

tasks.label: Create MAUI Content View
tasks.command: dotnet new maui-view-xaml -n ${input:pageName} -o ${input:folderName} && sed -i '' 's/^namespace.*/namespace AirIQ.${input:folderName};/' ${input:folderName}/${input:pageName}.xaml.cs && sed -i '' 's/x:Class=".*"/x:Class="AirIQ.${input:folderName}.${input:pageName}"/' ${input:folderName}/${input:pageName}.xaml

inputs.description: Select the MAUI item type to create
